tagline: Intakes the order, pulls comps and cross-checks an AVM — a state-certified appraiser signs the report of record.
problem: An appraisal is a USPAP-credentialed opinion of value under appraiser-independence rules, where nudging the number toward a target or signing without a credentialed appraiser is a Dodd-Frank / FIRREA violation, not a data error.
outcome: Orders intaken, comps pulled and reconciled against an AVM straight-through; a state-certified appraiser signs the USPAP report of record before it is delivered to the lender.

steps.does: Intake the order and property documents (engagement letter, prior report, photos)
Pull comparable sales (MLS) and assemble the comps grid
Reconcile the opinion of value against the AVM and run USPAP / appraiser-independence / fair-housing checks
A state-certified appraiser signs the USPAP report of record
Deliver / file the appraisal report (UCDP / EAD)
Monitor delivery status and handle reconsideration-of-value (ROV) requests
